metadata.description: Azure region for all net-new networking resources. Defaults to the resource group location.
Tags applied to all deployed resources.
Disable public network access on supported existing services after private endpoints are configured.

Address space for the virtual network.

Name of the DNS Private Resolver inbound endpoint subnet.
CIDR for the DNS Private Resolver inbound endpoint subnet (min /28).
Static private IP for the DNS Private Resolver inbound endpoint. Also set as the VNet DNS server and pushed to P2S VPN clients. Must be inside the inbound subnet (first usable IP is .164 in a /28).
Name of the DNS Private Resolver.
Name of the DNS Private Resolver inbound endpoint.
NSG name for the private endpoints subnet.
NSG name for the compute subnet.
NSG name for the management subnet.
Name of the VPN gateway.
Name of the VPN gateway Public IP.
VPN gateway SKU. Change if VpnGw2AZ is unavailable in the region.
VPN client address pool (must not overlap the VNet).
Entra ID tenant GUID for P2S authentication. Defaults to the deployment subscription tenant.
Entra audience for the Azure VPN Client. Default is the Microsoft-registered Azure VPN Client application ID.
Existing Azure AI Services multi-service account name.
Existing Azure AI Foundry account name.
Existing Azure Cosmos DB account name.
Existing Azure Storage account name.
Existing Azure AI Search service name (used for the indexer shared private link to storage).
Storage sub-resource the AI Search indexer connects to via the shared private link.
Shared private link group ID for the AI Search -> AI Foundry connection (chat completion skills).
Shared private link group ID for the AI Search -> multi-service Cognitive account connection (indexer skills).
Storage account SKU (must match the live account).
Storage account kind (must match the live account).
Cosmos account kind (must match the live account).
Cosmos primary write region (must match the live account).
Cosmos default consistency level (must match the live account).
Cosmos capabilities array (must match the live account).
AI Services account kind (must match the live account).
AI Foundry account kind (must match the live account).
AI Services account SKU (must match the live account).
AI Foundry account SKU (must match the live account).
AI Services custom subdomain (blank = use account name).
AI Foundry custom subdomain (blank = use account name).

properties.description: Allow P2S VPN clients to reach private endpoints (HTTPS + SMB file shares).
Allow intra-VNet traffic to private endpoints.
Deny all inbound traffic originating from the Internet.
Allow P2S VPN clients to manage compute workloads (SSH/RDP/HTTPS).
Deny all inbound traffic originating from the Internet.
Allow P2S VPN clients to reach management/jumpbox hosts (SSH/RDP).
Deny all inbound traffic originating from the Internet.
